name: The Leaderboard Indoor Golf
address: 5366 Plainfield Ave NE Suite B, Grand Rapids, MI 49525
about: The Leaderboard Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf facility located in Grand Rapids, MI, offering a full-service experience with the latest 4k golf simulation technology. It features high-end simulators from Uneekor and GSPro software, providing players with access to a wide variety of courses ranging from putt-putt to PGA-level. The venue operates on a per-bay, hourly pricing model and offers a welcoming environment suitable for both casual players and serious golfers looking to practice or play year-round. Beyond the simulators, The Leaderboard includes a cocktail lounge known for its craft beverages, creating a social space perfect for post-game relaxation or events.
why_golfers_like_it: High-fidelity 4k simulators with Uneekor and GSPro technology
On-site craft cocktail lounge with local beer from Founders and Bell's
Friendly staff provides thorough guidance for first-time users
Flexible pricing with hourly bay rentals and membership options
Wide variety of courses and game modes for different skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, but BYOB may be allowed (not explicitly confirmed)
Full-service bar with craft cocktails, house-made syrups, local beer from Founders and Bell's, plus wine and liquor options

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium photometric camera system for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own equipment, but the venue provides all necessary clubs and gear for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue has a full bar with craft cocktails and local beers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole play time varies depending on pace and game type, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers a fun experience for all ages and families, with no age restrictions mentioned.
